title: tecoma elliptica
intro: Tecoma elliptica, also known as Yellow Bells or Orange Trumpet Flower, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Tecoma elliptica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Tecoma elliptica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally as a poultice or salve to treat skin conditions and wounds.
